name: Infermedica API
description: The Infermedica API provides AI-powered symptom checking, medical diagnosis, and patient triage capabilities. It allows developers to build healthcare applications that can assess symptoms, suggest possible conditions, conduct diagnostic interviews, and triage patients to the appropriate level of care.
